domain: Faroese chain dance ringdans + kvæði ballads (Faroese national circle dance; medieval ring-dance origin; skipari leader-singer holds full ballad; 100+ dancer-singers form circle holding hands, join chorus refrain after each verse; no instruments — voice-only)
specific_mechanism: RINGDANS-CASCADE: skipari-leader + K-chorus information cascade for multi-agent LLM ensemble. (1) Designate 1 'skipari-LLM' as cascade-leader holding canonical task plan/ballad. (2) K 'chorus-LLMs' arranged in ring topology, each receives verse(t) from skipari + produces refrain_i(t). (3) Refrain accumulator: agg(refrain_1, ..., refrain_K) → consensus_t = mode/majority/median of refrains. (4) Step-lock: skipari emits verse(t+1) only after consensus_t reached. (5) Defect-rejection: if Shannon-entropy(refrains) > τ, skipari re-emits verse(t) with paraphrase variant (re-sing). (6) Refrain history forms episodic record of consensus-vs-disagreement.
llm_application: RINGDANS-CASCADE skipari-leader + K-chorus + step-locked verse-refrain consensus cascade + defect-rejection paraphrase re-sing. Differs from R413 CHASQUI-RELAY (different — Inca runner-to-runner relay, no chorus consensus). R422 + R429 KAMI-SHIBAI (different — illustrated story-card cascade). R438 PIROGUE-CASCADE (different — pirogue paddler cascade). R455 HAUSA-ZANGO (different — multi-station accumulate-propagate, no leader). R403 WELSH-PENILLION (different — solo respondent not K-chorus). Differs from LLM-Co Multi-Agent Coordination 2501.06322 (multi-agent collaboration survey, closest, but no skipari-K-chorus + step-lock + entropy-threshold re-sing). Multi-Agent Consensus-Seeking 2025 (different — supply-chain consensus, not leader-chorus). Multi-Agent Relay Defect Lanham 2026 (different — defect-accumulation analysis not skipari-cascade architecture). Differs by SKIPARI-LEADER + K-CHORUS RING + STEP-LOCK REFRAIN ENTROPY THRESHOLD RE-SING.
novelty_claim: LLM-Co + Multi-Agent Consensus-Seeking + Relay Defect + Routing Cascading cover leader-cascade + chorus consensus paradigm. RINGDANS-CASCADE adds (a) explicit skipari-K-chorus ring topology + (b) step-locked verse-refrain emission + (c) entropy-threshold re-sing paraphrase rejection. Recombination — borderline lookup.
